game_version: Limbus Company (structural facts; the 7 Sins are fixed)

entries.description: One of the seven Sin affinities. Skills, resistances, and E.G.O resource costs are colour-coded by Sin; Wrath is the red affinity.
One of the seven Sin affinities. Lust is the orange affinity.
One of the seven Sin affinities. Sloth is the yellow affinity.
One of the seven Sin affinities. Gluttony is the green affinity.
One of the seven Sin affinities. Gloom is the blue affinity.
One of the seven Sin affinities. Pride is the indigo affinity.
One of the seven Sin affinities. Envy is the purple affinity.
